title: Hammers by Juix
description: Datapack adding pickaxes that mine 3x3 (or more)
body:
# ℹ️ Hammers By Juix The Hammers pack will simply add hammers to your game, which are large pickaxes that allow you to mine in a 3x3 area ! You have to download my resource pack to enjoy the custom textures !

![Intro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/109ca5f92f96db0f3f99083a65651873f99cd916.webp) # ⚠️ Resourcepack needed You have to download Juix Resources [v1.3] (or later) to enable the custom textures (datapack version only)
[Juix Resources [v1.3+]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/juix-resources/versions)

Hammers for 1.18.x to 1.20.x is outdated, and not recommended to use
# ⚒️ Recipes Since this is a data pack, the crafts will not be displayed in JEI or REI. - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_chat**_ | shows recipes in chat - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_browser**_ | easier to read : it generates a chat link that displays all recipes included in my packs (if they are installed) You can craft hammers this way :

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e98fdfa34c5bb4bd6eaf9d95298ca17fd8ab0822.png)
# 🆕 Features & Options - **_/function datapack:hammers_datapack/change_mining_power_** | To customize Hammers mining size & depth such as 3x3x2, 3x3x3, 5x5x1, 5x5x2, 5x5x3 mining
- **_/function datapack:juix_datapacks/toggle_sneak_bypass_** | To enable or disable (disabled by default) Sneak bypass (hammers stop working when sneaking)
# 🪳 Known issues - This pack relies on item drop coordinates, please be careful with Magnet mods for example (Magnets by Juix is fully compatible with Hammers) Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
